title: lespedeza juncea var. divaricata
intro: Lespedeza juncea var. divaricata, also known as the bush clover, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Lespedeza juncea var. divaricata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and other health conditions.
